title: Buggy’s Cannon Threatens Orange Town
description: On pages 13–16, Buggy’s crew threatens Orange Town with overwhelming force, turning the town itself into a hostage.
scene: Buggy’s pirates rely on spectacle and destruction, while Luffy, Zoro, and Nami are forced to react under pressure.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You're not much a threat, Gomu Gomu...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: H...How is it possible for such a fight....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I feel as though I'm dreaming...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey... Did you just see that...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If...if we get caught into a fight like that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What? So, you're pissed that your face is scared?

summary: The part shows how Buggy rules through fear, while the Straw Hats begin breaking that fear through defiance and improvisation.
